allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/vitest/package.json'\); console.log\('vitest installed:', pkg.version\)" && node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/typescript/package.json'\); console.log\('typescript installed:', pkg.version\)" && npx @biomejs/biome --version 2>&1 | head -1)
